title: Great Britain is developing new long-range missiles for Ukraine...
title_en: Great Britain is developing new long-range missiles for Ukraine...

description: Great Britain is developing new long-range missiles for Ukraine without American components. As part of the Brakestop project, three British companies are creating cheaper analogues of Storm Shadow. The systems, developed by the British companies MBDA UK, MGI Engineering and Rotron Aerospace, successfully passed the tests that took place in the spring. The new missiles will be able to hit targets at a distance of more than 500 km and carry...
description_en: Great Britain is developing new long-range missiles for Ukraine without American components. As part of the Brakestop project, three British companies are creating cheaper analogues of Storm Shadow. The systems, developed by the British companies MBDA UK, MGI Engineering and Rotron Aerospace, successfully passed the tests that took place in the spring. The new missiles will be able to hit targets at a distance of more than 500 km and carry...
description_uk: Великобритания разрабатывает для Украины новые дальнобойные ракеты без американских компонентов В рамках проекта Brakestop три британские компании создают более дешевые аналоги Storm Shadow. Cистемы, разработанные британскими компаниями MBDA UK, MGI Engineering и Rotron Aerospace, успешно прошли испытания, состоявшиеся весной. Новые ракеты смогут поражать цели на расстоянии более 500 км и нести...

title: Crimea: Drone strike
description: Ukrainian drones hit gas storage facility in occupied Crimea, footage shows, power plant reportedly struck. Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces (USF) continued their drone campaign over occupied Crimea on June 19 and overnight into June 20, striking energy facilites on the peninsula, Ukrainian officials and Russian Telegram media channels reported.
description_en: Ukrainian drones hit gas storage facility in occupied Crimea, footage shows, power plant reportedly struck. Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces (USF) continued their drone campaign over occupied Crimea on June 19 and overnight into June 20, striking energy facilites on the peninsula, Ukrainian officials and Russian Telegram media channels reported.

title: Casualties reported
description: Regarding Belarus. When full-scale war broke out, we were attacked by rockets that killed children and adults. And Oleksandr Lukashenko knows it. A large number of missiles flew from Belarus. Then he called, apologized and said he had no control over it. I don't believe it, but he already talked about it. Now Russia will continue to push him into this war. Now he understands that Ukraine will be responsible. No need for extra...
description_en: Regarding Belarus. When full-scale war broke out, we were attacked by rockets that killed children and adults. And Oleksandr Lukashenko knows it. A large number of missiles flew from Belarus. Then he called, apologized and said he had no control over it. I don't believe it, but he already talked about it. Now Russia will continue to push him into this war. Now he understands that Ukraine will be responsible. No need for extra...
description_uk: Щодо Білорусі. Коли почалася повномасштабна війна, нас атакували ракети, які вбивали дітей і дорослих. І Олександр Лукашенко це знає. Велика кількість ракет летіла з Білорусі. Тоді він дзвонив, вибачався і казав, що це не контролював. Я в це не вірю, але він про це вже говорив. Зараз Росія буде його продовжувати штовхати в цю війну. Зараз він розуміє, що Україна буде відповідати. Не треба зайвих...

title: Honduran President Nasri Asfura began his first visit to Ukraine by...

description: Honduran President Nasri Asfura began his first visit to Ukraine by commemorating fallen Ukrainian soldiers. This is an important gesture of respect for our people who gave their lives for Ukraine, for freedom and peace. We appreciate such support, solidarity with our people and understanding of what Ukraine is going through today. Eternal memory and gratitude to all our defenders who died...

This is an important gesture of respect for our people who gave their lives for Ukraine, for freedom and peace. We appreciate such support, solidarity with our people and understanding of what Ukraine is going through today. Eternal memory and gratitude to all our defenders who died...
description_uk: Свій перший візит до України Президент Гондурасу Насрі Асфура розпочав зі вшанування пам’яті полеглих українських воїнів. Це важливий жест поваги до наших людей, які віддали життя за Україну, за свободу та мир. Цінуємо таку підтримку, солідарність із нашим народом і розуміння того, через що сьогодні проходить Україна. Вічна пам’ять і вдячність усім нашим захисникам і захисницям, які загинули,...

title: Kyiv: Why Ukraine’s nuclear corruption cleanup is taking so long Kyiv vowed...

description: Why Ukraine’s nuclear corruption cleanup is taking so long Kyiv vowed to clean up corruption at Ukraine’s troubled state-run nuclear company, but seven months after the country’s most significant wartime corruption scandal, the old system remains largely intact. Energoatom, which operates three working nuclear plants that generate more than 60% of Ukraine’s electricity, became the poster child...
